plugins.name: Multi-Embed Aggregator
plugins.description: Aggregates video sources from multiple embed services (vidking, 1embed, 2embed, vidlink, vidsrc, embed.su) used by streaming aggregation sites.
plugins.author: ARVIO Community

plugins.name: Vidking Embed Scraper
plugins.description: Scrapes sources from Vidking.net embed player (used by cineby.at and others).
plugins.author: ARVIO Community

plugins.name: 1embed.cc Scraper
plugins.description: Scrapes sources from 1embed.cc embed player (used by bcine.ru and others).
plugins.author: ARVIO Community
